exercises.title: Push-Up Standard
exercises.description: Hands under shoulders, body in one line, full controlled range.

exercises.title: Incline Push-Up
exercises.description: Use an elevated surface to keep clean mechanics and shoulder comfort.

exercises.title: Air Squat
exercises.description: Sit back and down, keep knees tracking over toes, stand with control.

exercises.title: Reverse Lunge
exercises.description: Step back softly and keep torso upright while driving through front heel.

exercises.title: Jumping Jacks
exercises.description: Maintain rhythm and soft landings while keeping shoulders relaxed.

exercises.title: Mountain Climbers
exercises.description: Drive knees forward quickly from a solid plank position.

exercises.title: Glute Bridge
exercises.description: Press through heels and squeeze glutes at the top without arching lower back.

exercises.title: Low Plank
exercises.description: Elbows under shoulders, neck neutral, abs braced.

exercises.title: Plank Hold
exercises.description: Focus on steady breathing and strong shoulder positioning.

exercises.title: Skipping Rope
exercises.description: Light on feet, keep wrists relaxed and maintain consistent cadence.

exercises.title: Squat Pulse
exercises.description: Stay low and pulse in a controlled range to increase time under tension.

exercises.title: Lateral Lunge
exercises.description: Step wide, sit into one hip, and keep the opposite leg straight.

exercises.title: Yoga Flow
exercises.description: Move through controlled positions to improve mobility and breath control.

exercises.title: Dead Bug
exercises.description: Keep lower back pressed down while alternating opposite arm and leg.

exercises.title: Bird Dog
exercises.description: Reach opposite arm and leg while keeping hips square.

exercises.title: Cat-Cow
exercises.description: Alternate spinal flexion and extension with smooth tempo and breathing.

exercises.title: Child Pose Reach
exercises.description: Relax hips and extend arms forward to release back and shoulders.

exercises.title: Hip Hinge Drill
exercises.description: Push hips back while maintaining neutral spine to pattern posterior chain mechanics.

exercises.title: Wall Sit
exercises.description: Hold 90-degree knee angle with full back contact on wall.

exercises.title: Calf Raise
exercises.description: Rise to toes with slow tempo and full range.

exercises.title: Russian Twist
exercises.description: Rotate through torso while keeping chest lifted and core engaged.

exercises.title: Superman Hold
exercises.description: Lift chest and legs slightly from floor while keeping neck neutral.

exercises.title: Plank Row
exercises.description: Stabilize your torso while rowing and resisting hip rotation.

exercises.title: Step-Back Jack
exercises.description: Low-impact jack variation for elevated heart rate without hard landings.
